header.introDescription: Access the full Odora catalog, discover the finest fragrances, and unlock exclusive offers reserved for members.

footer.description: Discover perfumes, compare notes and prices, and find the right bottle faster.
footer.privacyControlsDescription: Review technical cookies, analytics, and optional advertising preferences at any time.

privacyPreferences.title: Privacy preferences
privacyPreferences.description: We use what is needed to run Odora, read aggregate metrics, and, only with your consent, enable Google AdSense advertising.
privacyPreferences.emptyCategory: No active tools in this category.
privacyPreferences.summaryDescription: Technical cookies stay active, analytics remain privacy-friendly, and Google AdSense stays blocked until you explicitly allow marketing cookies.

necessary.title: Technical / necessary cookies
necessary.description: They are used for login, session handling, language preference, and protection of restricted areas. They stay active because they are required for the site to work.

analytics.title: Privacy-friendly analytics
analytics.description: We use Vercel Web Analytics to read aggregate usage trends, without remarketing or advertising profiling tools.

marketing.title: Marketing / profiling cookies
marketing.description: Google AdSense can load only if you allow marketing cookies. Without consent, advertising scripts stay disabled.

supabase-auth.label: Supabase Auth / session
supabase-auth.purpose: Keeps the account signed in, refreshes the session, and protects authenticated areas.
supabase-auth.storage: HTTP-only session cookies managed by Supabase SSR for authentication and token refresh.

locale.label: Language preference
locale.purpose: Remembers the selected language so the site can stay consistent across pages and localized redirects.

launch-gate.label: Preview access
launch-gate.purpose: Used only when private preview mode is active, to remember that protected access has been granted.
launch-gate.storage: First-party technical cookie set only in preview mode.

vercel-analytics.label: Vercel Web Analytics
vercel-analytics.purpose: Helps understand, in aggregate form, which pages are used most and how the overall experience can be improved.
vercel-analytics.storage: Aggregate measurements provided by Vercel Analytics; no marketing or remarketing cookies are active in the project.

google-adsense.label: Google AdSense
google-adsense.purpose: Loads advertising only after explicit marketing consent so Odora can show ads in eligible placements.
google-adsense.storage: Google may use cookies or similar identifiers for ad serving and measurement only when marketing consent is enabled.

controls.title: Advertising controls
controls.description: Choose whether Odora may load Google AdSense in this browser. You can change this choice again at any time.
controls.currentEnabled: Google AdSense is currently allowed in this browser.
controls.currentDisabled: Google AdSense is currently blocked in this browser.

banner.title: Optional cookies
banner.description: We use optional cookies only with your consent.

page.title: Find the right perfume by notes, mood, and budget
page.subtitle: Use the finder to narrow the catalog by real fragrance preferences including notes, season, occasion, and price range.
page.bodyOne: Odora Finder helps turn broad ideas such as warm perfume, office fragrance, or vanilla perfume into a more useful shortlist of matching scents.
page.bodyTwo: You can use Finder as a discovery starting point, compare Arabic or niche options, and then move into product pages to inspect notes, performance, and current pricing.

experience.fallbackError: Live matching is temporarily unavailable. Showing the closest catalog matches instead.

preset.description: These filters were pre-filled from the shortcut you selected on the homepage.

experience.empty: Choose a few preferences and run Finder to see fragrances that fit your taste.

page.title: Perfume catalog by notes, fragrance family, and price
page.subtitle: Explore the Odora catalog to compare perfumes by fragrance family, key notes, price range, and style.
page.bodyOne: This page organizes the catalog so you can compare multiple fragrances without bouncing across scattered product pages. Filter by family, price, notes, and sort order to get to the perfumes that actually deserve attention.
page.bodyTwo: If you already know what kind of perfume you want, start with the filters. If you still need direction, use Finder or the curated rankings first and then return here to refine the comparison.

page.title: Best perfumes and curated fragrance rankings
page.subtitle: Explore editorial rankings built to compare the best perfumes by style, longevity, value, and fragrance identity.
page.bodyOne: Odora rankings are not generic listicles. They are built to guide discovery when you want a clear starting point such as Arabic perfumes, niche perfumes, long-lasting fragrances, or the best perfumes under a target budget.
page.bodyTwo: Each section leads into individual product pages where you can inspect notes, scent profile, and available offers. Use this page as your editorial hub and the catalog as your final comparison layer.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Odora handles personal information when you browse the site, create an account, use discovery features, or click through to external retailers. For the operational detail on cookies, technical identifiers, and active analytics, see Odora's Cookie Policy as well.

sections.title: What We Collect
paragraphs: Odora may collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and account details when you sign up, log in, or update your profile.

We may also collect technical and usage information needed to operate the site, including device and browser data, pages viewed, referral information, authentication status, and interactions with product or retailer links.

sections.title: How We Use Information
paragraphs: We use information to provide the service, secure accounts, personalize discovery features, improve the catalog experience, and understand how people use the site.
We may also use information to maintain service quality, prevent abuse, investigate technical issues, and measure interest in pages, collections, and retailer links.

sections.title: Cookies, Sessions, and Similar Technologies
paragraphs: Odora uses technical cookies and similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember session state, store language preference, and support essential site functionality.
We also use Vercel Web Analytics to read aggregate usage trends and improve the experience. Separately, Google AdSense may load only after you explicitly allow marketing cookies in this browser.
For the operational detail on cookies and the categories currently active on the site, see the Cookie Policy linked in the footer and on its dedicated page.

sections.title: When We Share Information
paragraphs: We may share information with service providers that help us host, secure, and operate Odora, including infrastructure, authentication, analytics, and storage providers.
We may also disclose information if required by law, to protect users and the service, or in connection with a business transfer, merger, or restructuring.

sections.title: Retailers and External Links
paragraphs: Odora links to external retailer websites. When you leave Odora, the retailer's own privacy policy, terms, and tracking practices apply.
We are not responsible for the content, pricing, availability, or privacy practices of third-party websites linked from Odora.

sections.title: Data Retention and Security
paragraphs: We keep personal information for as long as reasonably necessary to operate the service, maintain accounts, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce site policies.
We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information, but no internet-based service can guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Your Rights and Choices
paragraphs: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict the use of your personal information, and to object to certain processing.
If you contact Odora with a privacy request, we may ask for information needed to verify the request before taking action.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the effective date shown on this page.
Material changes should be reflected on the site before they take effect.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains in simple terms which cookies and similar technologies Odora currently uses. The setup includes technical cookies for site functionality, privacy-friendly analytics, and an optional Google AdSense integration that stays disabled until you allow marketing cookies.

sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: Odora uses a limited set of browser-side technologies to handle login, sessions, site language, and, when needed, access to a private preview.

Vercel Web Analytics is active to read aggregate usage trends. Google AdSense is available as an optional advertising integration, but its script stays blocked until you explicitly allow marketing cookies.

sections.title: Technical and necessary cookies
paragraphs: These cookies always remain active because they are required to provide user-requested features such as authentication, session continuity, language selection, and protection of restricted areas.
Supabase Auth / session (Supabase): keeps the account signed in, refreshes the session, and protects authenticated areas. Technical identifiers: sb-*-auth-token*.
Language preference (Odora / next-intl): remembers the selected language so the site stays consistent across pages and localized redirects. Technical identifier: NEXT_LOCALE.
Preview access (Odora): used only when private preview mode is active, to remember that protected access has been granted. Technical identifier: odora_preview_access.

sections.title: Privacy-friendly analytics
paragraphs: We use Vercel Web Analytics to understand, in aggregate form, which pages are viewed and where the experience can be improved. This setup is not used for behavioral advertising, audience building, or remarketing.
Vercel Web Analytics (Vercel): provides aggregate measurements of traffic and site usage. The project does not include marketing or remarketing cookies tied to this tool.

sections.title: Marketing and profiling cookies
paragraphs: Odora can load Google AdSense only after explicit marketing consent from the browser-side privacy controls. If you refuse or do not provide consent, the AdSense script does not run.
Google AdSense (Google): may use cookies or similar identifiers for ad serving and measurement only after consent. Odora also publishes the Google publisher declaration in /ads.txt.

sections.title: Preferences and controls
paragraphs: In the site footer you can always find the Privacy preferences control, which summarizes active categories, lets you allow or block Google AdSense, and links to this Cookie Policy and the Privacy Policy.
You can also manage or delete cookies from your browser. Keep in mind that blocking technical cookies may affect login, session continuity, language switching, or other essential site functions.

sections.title: External links and retailers
paragraphs: When you leave Odora and visit a retailer or third-party site, that party's cookies and policies apply. Odora does not control cookies set by external sites after you click through.
This Cookie Policy reflects the technical setup reviewed on April 1, 2026.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern access to Odora and explain the basic rules that apply when you browse fragrances, compare offers, create an account, or follow links to external retailers.

sections.title: Using Odora
paragraphs: By accessing or using Odora, you agree to use the site lawfully and in accordance with these Terms of Use.
You must not misuse the site, attempt to interfere with its operation, scrape restricted areas without permission, or use the service in a way that harms Odora, its users, or connected retailers.

sections.title: Content, Pricing, and Availability
paragraphs: Odora provides fragrance discovery content, product information, and price comparisons for general informational purposes.
Prices, shipping costs, availability, and retailer information can change at any time. Final pricing and purchase terms are always determined by the retailer you choose.

sections.title: Accounts
paragraphs: If you create an account, you are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for activity that occurs under your account.
Odora may suspend or restrict accounts that are used fraudulently, abusively, or in violation of these terms.

sections.title: Retailers and Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Odora may link to third-party retailers and services. Those sites operate independently and have their own terms, policies, and commercial conditions.
Any purchase, return, shipment, or customer service issue relating to a retailer order must be resolved with that retailer.

sections.title: Affiliate Relationships
paragraphs: Some outbound links on Odora may be affiliate links. If you click one of those links and complete a qualifying purchase, Odora may earn a commission.
Affiliate relationships do not change the price you pay, and they do not create a direct sales relationship between Odora and the retailer transaction.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
paragraphs: The Odora brand, site design, original copy, editorial selections, and other original materials on the site are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
You may not copy, republish, or commercially exploit Odora content without prior written permission, except where permitted by law.

sections.title: Disclaimers and Liability
paragraphs: Odora is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, perfect accuracy, or that every listing, offer, or ranking will always be complete or current.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Odora is not liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or retailer-side losses arising from your use of the site or reliance on third-party retailer information.

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes become effective means you accept the revised terms.
The effective date at the top of this page reflects the latest version.

affiliateDisclosure.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliateDisclosure.intro: Odora may participate in affiliate programs with selected retailers and networks. This page explains how that relationship works and how it affects outbound product links.

sections.title: How Affiliate Links Work
paragraphs: Some links from Odora to external retailers may be affiliate links. If you click one of those links and complete a qualifying purchase, Odora may earn a commission from the retailer or affiliate network.
This commission helps support the operation of the site, including product research, editorial curation, and maintenance of price comparison features.

sections.title: What This Means for You
paragraphs: Using an affiliate link generally does not increase the price you pay. The purchase is completed on the retailer's website, under that retailer's own pricing and commercial terms.
Availability, final pricing, shipping, returns, and customer support are all handled by the retailer you choose.

sections.title: Editorial Independence
paragraphs: Odora aims to keep editorial selection, product discovery, and comparison design independent from affiliate relationships.
When we highlight a fragrance, a collection, or a retailer, the goal is to improve discovery and comparison clarity, not to guarantee a purchase recommendation for every user.

sections.title: Retailer Coverage
paragraphs: Not every retailer shown on Odora will necessarily be monetized through an affiliate relationship at all times. Retailer coverage can change as programs open, close, or update approval status.
Where affiliate links are available, Odora may prioritize them over standard product links for the same retailer destination.

sections.title: Price and Availability
paragraphs: Retailer prices and stock status can change quickly. Odora may display the latest known pricing, but the retailer page is always the final source of truth before purchase.
If a retailer changes pricing or availability after you click through, that change is outside Odora's control.
